'''Clezo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] during the time of [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]]. 

Clezo provided funding for [[House Tresario]] of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]].

He was present in a Vigo meeting where [[Guri]] publicly executed Vigo [[Green]] for spying for an outsider organization.<ref name="Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire novel">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref>

After Xizor's death, Clezo was seen in a Vigo council meeting about the future of the Black Sun. He and [[Wumdi]] did not like when [[Lonay]] started acting as head of the council, and Clezo was not happy seeing an attractive woman supporting him, stating he would not be ordered by some human ''and'' female.<ref name="see3">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 3]]</ref>

During a later meeting, the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]] showed up after the human female's invitation. Then the room was invaded by thugs, who were quickly slaughtered. The human female identified the bodies as [[Vekker (Quarren)|Vekker's]] soldiers; nobody knew that the mysterious human who was actually [[Savan]] in disguise, and the one responsible for the attack to incriminate Vekker. Savan claimed that Clezo's and Wumdi's troops would soon be after Vekker.<ref name="see3" />

==Personality and traits==
Clezo was a subdued, but well-tailored dresser. He was considered short for his [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="Shadow Games">''[[Shadow Games]]''</ref>

He was especially skilled at selecting the proper personnel for success, and endeavored to provide his part of Black Sun with diverse interests and holdings.

==Equipment==
His [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was the ''[[Treasure of Rodia]]'', a [[Dzundo-class star yacht]].
